## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Security hardening

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] RBAC tests, if relevant
- [ ] Responsive or E2E tests, if relevant

## Security And Data Review

- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, webhook URLs, database files, logs, or private
      operational data are included.
- [ ] RBAC, audit, alerting, reporting, or ingestion behavior was reviewed if
      affected.
- [ ] `.env.example` still contains placeholders only.

## Notes

Add reviewer notes, migration notes, or follow-up work.
